name: Hive Guard
description: Hive Guard is a set of APIs from Hive targeting fraud and abuse, including AI-generated image and text detection, deepfake detection and document tampering. It is used by marketplaces, dating apps and fintechs alongside its content-moderati

seo.title: Hive Guard — Fraud & Risk Management
seo.meta_description: Hive Guard: Hive Guard is a set of APIs from Hive targeting fraud and abuse, including AI-generated image and text detection, deepfake detection and document ta

when_to_use: AI-generated image detection for marketplace listing fraud
Deepfake video detection for identity verification workflows
Document tampering detection for KYC submission review
Synthetic media flagging for social platform trust and safety
Fraud signal API for dating app profile verification

pros: Strong AI-generated content and deepfake detection
Useful for document tampering on KYC flows
Simple REST API, fast to wire in
Shares infra with strong content-moderation models
cons: Narrow fraud scope, not a full risk platform
Per-call pricing can add up at scale
Accuracy varies by content type and quality
Still evolving vs established KYC document tools
review.verdict: A sharp specialist tool for AI-content and deepfake risks; complement, not replace, your core fraud stack.
review.best_for: Marketplaces, dating and KYC flows screening for deepfakes and tampered documents.
review.not_for: Teams needing device fingerprinting, transaction scoring or full identity verification.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based metering; scales with consumption, no explicit peak-lock.
